title: Souls Titles
description: Adds custom new area sound from Dark Souls to the Travelers Titles mod.
body:
![Souls Titles Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9797f612ab3873b32537e2a17a3a7a123afd68c5.png)
A simple resource pack that adds the new area sound from **Dark Souls** to the **Travelers Titles** mod

**Here's a demo:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/F2THkjjLSTs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



Download the **Travelers Titles** mod [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelers-titles)
